investigations.name: annealing
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 2+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=2, J_dd=2, J_ld=2, J_lM=8, J_dM=8 (gamma_ld=+0, gamma_lM=+7, gamma_dM=+7); T=0.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=40.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: equilibrated_light. Figures reproduced: Fig 2, Fig 3.

investigations.name: cell_sorting
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 12+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=14, J_dd=2, J_ld=11, J_lM=16, J_dM=16 (gamma_ld=+3, gamma_lM=+9, gamma_dM=+15); T=10.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=40.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: equilibrated_random. Figures reproduced: Fig 12, Fig 13, Fig 14, Fig 15, Fig 16, Table II, Table III.

investigations.name: checkerboard
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 7+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=10, J_dd=8, J_ld=6, J_lM=12, J_dM=12 (gamma_ld=-3, gamma_lM=+7, gamma_dM=+8); T=10.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=40.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: equilibrated_random. Figures reproduced: Fig 7, Fig 8, Fig 9, Table I.

investigations.name: dispersal_no_separate
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 27+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=14, J_dd=2, J_ld=29, J_lM=16, J_dM=16 (gamma_ld=+21, gamma_lM=+9, gamma_dM=+15); T=5.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=40.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: equilibrated_random. Figures reproduced: Fig 27.

investigations.name: dispersal_separate
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 26+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=14, J_dd=2, J_ld=35, J_lM=16, J_dM=16 (gamma_ld=+27, gamma_lM=+9, gamma_dM=+15); T=5.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=40.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: equilibrated_random. Figures reproduced: Fig 26.

investigations.name: dispersal_sloughing
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 25+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=14, J_dd=4, J_ld=11, J_lM=2, J_dM=16 (gamma_ld=+2, gamma_lM=-5, gamma_dM=+14); T=5.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=40.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: equilibrated_random. Figures reproduced: Fig 25.

investigations.name: engulfment
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 18+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=14, J_dd=2, J_ld=11, J_lM=16, J_dM=16 (gamma_ld=+3, gamma_lM=+9, gamma_dM=+15); T=10.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=40.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: half_split. Figures reproduced: Fig 18, Fig 19.

investigations.name: global_equilibration
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 4+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=2, J_dd=2, J_ld=2, J_lM=8, J_dM=8 (gamma_ld=+0, gamma_lM=+7, gamma_dM=+7); T=5.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=40.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: brick_equilibrate. Figures reproduced: Fig 4, Fig 5.

investigations.name: partial_sorting
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 22+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=11, J_dd=2, J_ld=14, J_lM=16, J_dM=16 (gamma_ld=+7.5, gamma_lM=+10.5, gamma_dM=+15); T=5.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=40.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: equilibrated_random. Figures reproduced: Fig 22, Fig 23, Fig 24.

investigations.name: position_reversal
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 20+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=14, J_dd=2, J_ld=11, J_lM=30, J_dM=16 (gamma_ld=+3, gamma_lM=+23, gamma_dM=+15); T=10.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=40.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: equilibrated_random. Figures reproduced: Fig 20, Fig 21.

investigations.name: vacancy_cavity
investigations.description: Reproduction of the Fig 28+ example from Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993). Exact parameters: J_ll=14, J_dd=2, J_ld=11, J_lM=16, J_dM=16 (gamma_ld=+3, gamma_lM=+9, gamma_dM=+15); T=5.0, lambda=1.0, target A_l=20.0, A_d=40.0. Initial condition: equilibrated_random. Figures reproduced: Fig 28.
